description: Style Note If you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these track pants from adidas belong in your wardrobe. The fabric is breathable with ClimaLite technology, and the waistband is soft for a more snug Fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool T-shirt and an excellent pair of shoes and you're ready to hit the road! Product Details Black track pants, elastic waistband with drawstring, branding on the left leg, pockets on either side, toggle strap at the hem, lining for increased absorption Material and Care 100% Polyester Gentle machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Do not iron on print or decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32'') is wearing a size M
